title: Mob Heads Collection
description: Mobs can drop their head when killed by a player
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/82397ec87fd4d8fe4413567fa87b75ca60c5825c.png) ![Strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a90328d3b2099d607e9fda80b82974a337e9868_0.webp) ## About **The Mob Heads Collection mod adds heads for every mob and their variants, which can drop when a player kills a mob, with configurable drop chances. Each head has a unique sound when placed on a note block. The mod also tracks collected heads with an advancement system, turning collecting into its own challenge.** **By bringing together the thrill of collection and the creative possibilities of decoration, Mob Heads Collection appeals to both completionists and builders. The advancement system not only rewards persistent players but also provides goals beyond basic gameplay.** ![Strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a90328d3b2099d607e9fda80b82974a337e9868_0.webp) ## Features в—ЅпёЏ **Adds heads for all mobs and their variants.** в—ЅпёЏ **Each head makes a unique sound when placed on a note block.** в—ЅпёЏ **Heads can drop as loot when a mob is killed by a player, which allows collectors to obtain unique mob heads throughout the game.** в—ЅпёЏ **The drop chance is fully configurable, so you can adjust the frequency and rarity of drops to match your preferred difficulty level (In development).** в—ЅпёЏ **Custom chat notifications appear when a head drops (In development).** в—ЅпёЏ **РЎollected heads are tracked through an advancement system (In development).** в—ЅпёЏ **Vanilla mob heads are not changed вЂ“ they only drop by vanilla methods.** ![Strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a90328d3b2099d607e9fda80b82974a337e9868_0.webp) ## Media ![Heads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18b960badb894d4ca17153eb773781dd61f1db92.png) ![Strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a90328d3b2099d607e9fda80b82974a337e9868_0.webp) ## Installation ### Installing a Datapack: в—ЅпёЏ **Launch Minecraft and select your world (new: "More" в†’ "Data Packs" / existing: "Edit" в†’ "Open World Folder" в†’ datapacks).** в—ЅпёЏ **Add the datapack (.zip or folder) to the appropriate place.** в—ЅпёЏ **Activate it (new: move right; existing: /reload or F3+T).** в—ЅпёЏ **Finish creating or loading the world.** > **Datapack only works with cheats enabled! Check: `/datapack list enabled`.**
### Installing a Mod: в—ЅпёЏ **Download the .jar mod matching your minecraft version.** в—ЅпёЏ **Make sure there are no conflicts with datapacks or other mods.** в—ЅпёЏ **Place the .jar into the mods folder (create it if needed) in the root directory.** в—ЅпёЏ **Restart the minecraft and check if the mod works (e.g., with `/mods`).** > **Always back up your server.**
### Compatibility ![Compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85cca67279c287b8a1205fe884c2b927c38c6723.png) ![Strip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a90328d3b2099d607e9fda80b82974a337e9868_0.webp) ## Drop Rates
Passive в—ЅпёЏ **Allay 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Armadillo 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Axolotl 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Axolotl Blue 0.5%** в—ЅпёЏ **Bat 0.2%** в—ЅпёЏ **Camel 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Camel Husk 0.2%** в—ЅпёЏ **Cat 0.2%** в—ЅпёЏ **Chicken 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Cod 0.2%** в—ЅпёЏ **Copper Golem 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Cow 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Donkey 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Frog 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Glow Squid 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Happy Ghast 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Horse 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Mooshroom 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Mooshroom Brown 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Mule 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Ocelot 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Parrot 0.5%** в—ЅпёЏ **Pig 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Pufferfish 0.5%** в—ЅпёЏ **Rabbit 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Salmon 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Sheep 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Skeleton Horse 1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Sniffer 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Snow Golem 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Squid 0.02%** в—ЅпёЏ **Strider 0.5%** в—ЅпёЏ **Tadpole 0.5%** в—ЅпёЏ **Tropical Fish 0.005%** в—ЅпёЏ **Turtle 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Villager 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Wandering Trader 0.2%** в—ЅпёЏ **Zombie Horse 0.1%**
Neutral в—ЅпёЏ **Bee 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Cave Spider 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Dolphin 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Drowned 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Enderman 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Fox 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Goat 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Iron Golem 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Llama 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Nautilus 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Panda 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Panda Brown & Weak 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Polar Bear 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Spider 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Trader Llama 0.5%** в—ЅпёЏ **Wolf 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Zombie Nautilus 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Zombified Piglin 0.01%**
Hostile в—ЅпёЏ **Blaze 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Bogged 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Breeze 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Creaking 0.2%** в—ЅпёЏ **Charged Creeper 0.5%** в—ЅпёЏ **Endermite 0.5%** в—ЅпёЏ **Evoker 1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Ghast 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Guardian 0.01%** в—ЅпёЏ **Hoglin 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Husk 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Magma Cube 0.002%** в—ЅпёЏ **Parched 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Phantom 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Piglin Brute 1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Pillager 0.02%** в—ЅпёЏ **Ravager 0.2%** в—ЅпёЏ **Shulker 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Silverfish 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Slime 0.002%** в—ЅпёЏ **Stray 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Vex 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Vindicator 0.1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Witch 0.05%** в—ЅпёЏ **Zoglin 0.2%** в—ЅпёЏ **Zombie Villager 0.5%**
Bosses в—ЅпёЏ **Elder Guardian 1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Warden 1%** в—ЅпёЏ **Wither 1%**
